knot_assessments.notes: Extended third throw 72-131s; biggest single time sink but knot completed cleanly.

technique_summary: V15 is a clean successful run at 145s / 453 FLS — no gap, no avulsion, surgeon's knot + two hand-switched single throws all secure. The dominant time cost is the third throw at 59 seconds (72s-131s); needle loading (6s), suture placement (20s), and cutting (14s) are all efficient. Time loss here is technique-paced, not error-driven — the trainee completed the task correctly but spent extra seconds on the final throw, likely on wrap setup or tension confirmation.
